MultiLoanExtractionSchema.description: Schema for documents containing multiple distinct loan accounts.

account_number.description: Master account number tying all loans together, if present.
account_number.title: Account Number

account_monthly_payment.description: Account-level monthly payment (e.g. 'Regular Monthly Payment Amount'). Set when the document shows a combined payment for all loans with no per-loan breakdown.
account_monthly_payment.title: Account Monthly Payment

MultiLoanExtractionSchema.title: MultiLoanExtractionSchema

Provenance.description: Metadata linking extracted data back to its source in the document.

page.description: The 1-indexed page number where the information was found
page.title: Page

snippet.description: The exact text snippet used as source context
snippet.title: Snippet

Provenance.title: Provenance

SingleLoanExtractionSchema.description: Schema for extracting loan details from a document.

name.description: The name of the loan or lender
name.title: Name

principal.description: The original principal amount of the loan
principal.title: Principal

interest_rate.description: The annual interest rate as a percentage (e.g., 12.0)
interest_rate.title: Interest Rate

annual_eir.description: The Effective Interest Rate (EIR) per year as a percentage, if explicitly stated in the document. Different from interest_rate for add-on loans.
annual_eir.title: Annual Eir

installment_amount.description: The monthly or per-period installment amount. Return null if not stated explicitly per individual loan.
installment_amount.title: Installment Amount

duration_months.description: Explicit loan term in months. Return null if no numeric term is stated in the document. Do NOT infer from repayment plan names or dates.
duration_months.title: Duration Months

start_date.description: The start date of the loan in YYYY-MM-DD format
start_date.title: Start Date

currency.description: The ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., USD, PHP, SGD)
currency.title: Currency

lender.description: The name of the lending institution
lender.title: Lender

reasoning.description: Brief explanation of the extraction results
reasoning.title: Reasoning

provenance.description: Source location for the primary extracted data (page + snippet)

SingleLoanExtractionSchema.title: SingleLoanExtractionSchema

StatementExtractionSchema.description: Structured extraction of multiple transactions from a bank statement.

account_name.description: The name of the account or institution
account_name.title: Account Name

statement_period.description: The date range covered by the statement
statement_period.title: Statement Period

reasoning.description: Brief explanation of the extraction results
reasoning.title: Reasoning

StatementExtractionSchema.title: StatementExtractionSchema

TransactionExtractionItem.description: A single transaction extracted from a bank statement.

date.description: The transaction date in YYYY-MM-DD format
date.title: Date

description.description: The transaction description or merchant name
description.title: Description

amount.description: The transaction amount (negative for expenses, positive for income/deposits)
amount.title: Amount

TransactionExtractionItem.title: TransactionExtractionItem

description: Polymorphic response for unified document processing.

document_type.description: The classified type of the document

loan_structure.description: 'single' if one loan account, 'multi' if multiple distinct loan accounts with different account numbers. Summaries/totals of the same account are NOT separate loans.
loan_structure.title: Loan Structure

verification_status.description: Status of the parallel verification/cross-check process.
verification_status.title: Verification Status

user_friendly_message.description: A human-readable message explaining reliability issues (e.g., rate limits).
user_friendly_message.title: User Friendly Message

ocr_telemetry.description: Technical metadata about the extraction process (char counts, method)
ocr_telemetry.title: Ocr Telemetry

title: UnifiedDocumentResponse
